_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the look-alike / byte-inspection path of the excel-activities/read-range-sheet-not-found playbook. The job logs fixture surfaces the actual sheet name as 'Quarterly\u00A0Data' (NBSP between words); the configured name and the error message use regular space 'Quarterly Data'. Visually identical in any tool output; differ at byte level. Agent must recognize the impasse and recommend the host-side PowerShell byte-compare snippet from the playbook.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0011111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
